name: The Weir Group PLC
description: The Weir Group PLC is a leading global engineering company headquartered in Glasgow, Scotland. Founded in 1871, the company specializes in providing highly engineered mission-critical solutions for the mining and infrastructure markets. Weir focuses on delivering sustainable and efficient technology that helps its customers improve productivity while reducing their environmental impact. With a presence in over 70 countries, the group is committed to innovation and engineering excellence, supporting the global transition to a low-carbon economy through its advanced equipment, aftermarket support, and digital solutions for complex industrial challenges.
